constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options
Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only
Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words

reference_templates.title: Output with range
reference_templates.notes: Years of experience via range input with output element display

reference_templates.title: Mixed language attributes
reference_templates.notes: One field has lang=sv with Swedish label among English fields

reference_templates.title: CSS hidden wizard steps
reference_templates.notes: Multi-step wizard with only one step visible via CSS class toggling
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Wizard steps

<

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, large, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Inputs laid out in table cells, not flex card stacks only Required: Fields inside details/summary or hidden until click Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Reference DOM (Output with range): Years of experience via range input with output element display Reference DOM (Mixed language attributes): One field has lang=sv with Swedish label among English fields Reference DOM (CSS hidden wizard steps): Multi-step wizard with only one step visible via CSS class toggling Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: custom-combobox, duplicate-name-attrs, table-layout, details-accordion, glued-label-text. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Output with range; Mixed language attributes; CSS hidden wizard steps.
